rationale: Rule governs allocation of FSP funds for credit enhancement, capped at 1%. No reference to homestead exemptions or property tax values. No direct conflict with increasing the homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner may allocate not more than one percent of the amount appropriated for the Foundation School Program for purposes of the program under this subchapter.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on FSP appropriations is possible but not addressed by this rule's operative text.
